CustomField.description: This indicates the rental adjustment period, matching the period entered in the N Factor Details table under the contract's N Factor Schedule. The system automatically assigns the start and end dates for each period based on the rent slips and the reset frequency.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This indicates the rental adjustment period, matching the period entered in the N Factor Details table under the contract's N Factor Schedule. The system automatically assigns the start and end dates for each period based on the rent slips and the reset frequency.
CustomField.label: Period
